title: Mexican Pasta Fiesta
description: A flavorful twist on traditional pasta dishes, blending Mexican and Italian flavors. This recipe combines the comfort of pasta with the spices of Mexican cuisine.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the penne pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the smoked paprika, cumin, and chili powder. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, cooked pasta, and reserved pasta water to the skillet.
Simmer the mixture for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
